creator: imp@village.org
text:
In message <v04210103b5e4b34118ea@[128.113.24.47]> Garance A Drosihn writes:
: Back on May 15th, Warner gave this patch/pr a ringing
: endorsement by changing the status to:
: 
:      I suppose I'll do it.
: 
: I thought I'd follow up at this fourth-month mark, and
: see if life is any less busy now then it was back then...
:                 :-)

Hey, I have 3 days before the 4 month anniversary  :-)

Warner
